case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. VALERIE BISTLINE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC SERVED JUN-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BISTLINE, VALERIE

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BISTLINE, VALERIE $4,182.84 PRINCIPAL, $905.37 INTEREST, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,334.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BISTLINE, VALERIE

NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY HARRIS, STELIOS A.
